title: Giant Ice Spike
description: Adds a Giant Ice Spike to the Ice Spikes biome
body:
### Giant Ice Spike

**This simple mod adds a Giant Ice Spike to the Ice Spikes Biome.**

![Ice Spike](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/53520bfc06453fe9adb89a236eea11b73d575436.jpeg)
The terrain around the Ice Spike is designed to blend naturally with the biome.

![Ice Spike](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/5e3c000c37cb2f3c1369419ef280ca14d6865d89.jpeg)

Perfect spot to build a base nearby

Feel free to use this mod in your modpacks
